info.title: Gift v2
info.description: This API manages gift information and related entities.

post.description:
Supported gift types include One-time, pledge, pledge payment, recurring, stock, gift-in-kind, and other.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: default_constituency
parameters.description: Flag indicating to default constituency. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: default_soft_credits
parameters.description: Flag indicating to default soft credits. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: default_fundraiser_credits
parameters.description: Flag indicating to default fundraiser credits. Defaults to false.

post.description:
This adds installments to an existing pledge gift.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: gift_id
parameters.description: The ID of the pledge to add installments for.

requestBody.description: The installments to add for a pledge gift.

get.description:
This gets the installments of an existing pledge gift.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: gift_id
parameters.description: The ID of the pledge to get the installments for.

post.description:
This updates a stock gift to sold with the given details.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: gift_id
parameters.description: The ID of the stock gift to sell.

requestBody.description: The details of the stock sale.

400.description: An attempt was made to sell a gift that was not of type Stock or the sold stock details are invalid.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

404.description: An attempt was made to sell a gift that does not exist.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

get.description:
This gets the payments of an existing pledge gift.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: gift_id
parameters.description: The ID of the pledge to get the payments for.

200.description: Successfully returned the pledge payments for the specified pledge gift.

400.description: An attempt was made to get a pledge payments for a gift that is not a pledge.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

404.description: An attempt was made to get pledge payments for a gift that does not exist.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

post.description:
This generates the installments for a given schedule.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

requestBody.description: The schedule used to generate installments.

get.description:
Returns a single batch gift by ID

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: batchGiftId
parameters.description: ID of the batch gift to return

batch_gift_errors.exception_error_message: A gift of type {0} was marked {1} and must be marked Do Not Post.

400.description: Returned when no batch gift ID was provided or the ID was not in the correct format.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

404.description: Returned when a batch gift with the provided ID does not exist.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

patch.description:
Updates a batch gift

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: batchGiftId
parameters.description: The ID of the batch gift.

requestBody.description: The changes to the batch gift.

200.description: Returned when when the gift was updated successfully. Any resolvable exceptions will be returned.

errors.error_message: The provided date '{0}' does not fall within the valid range for a date.

400.description: Returned when the specified batch gift ID or the request body is not in the correct format OR the batch is already approved OR exceptions prevented the change from being applied

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

404.description: Returned when a batch gift with the provided ID does not exist.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

post.description:
Add multiple gifts to an existing unapproved batch

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

requestBody.description: The gifts to add to batch.

200.description: Returned when gifts were added successfully. Any resolvable exceptions will be returned.

gift_validation_errors.error_message: The provided date '{0}' does not fall within the valid range for a date.

400.description: Returned when the specified batch ID or the request body is not in the correct format OR the batch is already approved OR exceptions prevent the gift being added. The values property will contain any hard exceptions.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

LookupId1.error_message: The required argument 'GiftSplits' was not assigned a value.

404.description: Returned when a batch with the provided ID does not exist.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

patch.summary: Edit payment information for a recurring gift (PREVIEW)
patch.description:
Edits payment information for a recurring gift paid by credit card.

***This endpoint is in PREVIEW and may be changed or removed at any time.***

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: ETag of the Entity. The value should match the current ETag header value from the gift GET request or it should be * for an unconditional update.

value.description: The name of the acknowledgement letter.

id.description: The ID of the acknowledgement letter.

active.description: True if the acknowledgement letter is active.  False otherwise.

sequence.description: The sequence of the acknowledgement letter.

type.description:
A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type (e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be "about:blank".

Available values:
typedetail
urn:blackbaud:model-validation-errorA model validation rule was violated, such as a missing required field.
urn:blackbaud:required-argument-not-assigned-valueThe required argument '{0}' was not assigned a value.
urn:blackbaud:gift-argument-not-validThere were issues with the contract: {0}

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using proactive content negotiation; see [RFC7231], Section 3.4).

status.description: The HTTP status code ([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

trace_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

span_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

AddEditBatchGift400ResponseTypesProblemD.description: The problem details when a 400 status code is returned for the GetBatchGift endpoint

error_message.description: If the amendment failed, the error message indicates why the failure occurred.

parent_id.description: The identifier for the payment's parent gift

charge_first_payment.description: True if a recurring gift payment should be charged immediately. Only applicable for recurring gifts.

If no value is provided, this will default to the ID of the pledge.

type.description: A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type (e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be "about:blank".

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using proactive content negotiation; see [RFC7231], Section 3.4).

status.description: The HTTP status code ([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

trace_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

span_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

ProblemDetails.description: A machine-readable format for specifying errors in HTTP API responses based on https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7807.

next_installment_date.description: The date of the next scheduled installment. Read only.

frequency.title: ScheduleFrequency
frequency.description:
The frequency of the gift schedule.
Pledge gifts cannot have EVERY_SIX_MONTHS, EVERY_FOUR_WEEKS, or Weekly frequencies. Instead, use an Irregular frequency.
Recurring gifts cannot have Single or Irregular frequencies. Consider a different gift type.

start_date.description: The date that the gift schedule starts.

end_date.description: The date that the gift schedule ends.

number_of_installments.description: The number of installments on the pledge schedule.

type.description:
A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type (e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be "about:blank".

Available values:
typedetail
urn:blackbaud:model-validation-errorA model validation rule was violated, such as a missing required field.
urn:blackbaud:required-argument-not-assigned-valueThe required argument '{0}' was not assigned a value.
urn:blackbaud:invalid-gift-typeA request was made with a gift type that is not valid for the operation: {0}
urn:blackbaud:sold-stock-details-argument-not-validThere were issues with the contract: {0}

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using proactive content negotiation; see [RFC7231], Section 3.4).

status.description: The HTTP status code ([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

trace_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

span_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.
